arabicText: قٓ ۚ وَٱلْقُرْءَانِ ٱلْمَجِيدِ
translationText: Qaf. By the Glorious Quran.

arabicText: بَلْ عَجِبُوٓا۟ أَن جَآءَهُم مُّنذِرٌۭ مِّنْهُمْ فَقَالَ ٱلْكَٰفِرُونَ هَٰذَا شَىْءٌ عَجِيبٌ
translationText: They marveled that a warner has come to them from among them. The disbelievers say, "This is something strange.

arabicText: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًۭا ۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجْعٌۢ بَعِيدٌۭ
translationText: When we have died and become dust? This is a farfetched return."

arabicText: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَٰبٌ حَفِيظٌۢ
translationText: We know what the earth consumes of them, and with Us is a comprehensive book.

arabicText: بَلْ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ لَمَّا جَآءَهُمْ فَهُمْ فِىٓ أَمْرٍۢ مَّرِيجٍ
translationText: But they denied the truth when it has come to them, so they are in a confused state.

arabicText: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍۢ
translationText: Have they not observed the sky above them, how We constructed it, and decorated it, and it has no cracks?

arabicText: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۭ بَهِيجٍۢ
translationText: And the earth, how We spread it out, and set on it mountains, and grew in it all kinds of delightful pairs?

arabicText: تَبْصِرَةًۭ وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍۢ مُّنِيبٍۢ
translationText: A lesson and a reminder for every penitent worshiper.

arabicText: وَنَزَّلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءًۭ مُّبَٰرَكًۭا فَأَنۢبَتْنَا بِهِۦ جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَحَبَّ ٱلْحَصِيدِ
translationText: And We brought down from the sky blessed water, and produced with it gardens and grain to harvest.

arabicText: وَٱلنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَٰتٍۢ لَّهَا طَلْعٌۭ نَّضِيدٌۭ
translationText: And the soaring palm trees, with clustered dates.

arabicText: رِّزْقًۭا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةًۭ مَّيْتًۭا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ
translationText: As sustenance for the servants. And We revive thereby a dead town. Likewise is the resurrection.

arabicText: كَذَّبَتْ قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمُ نُوحٍۢ وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلرَّسِّ وَثَمُودُ
translationText: Before them the people of Noah denied the truth, and so did the dwellers of Russ, and Thamood.

arabicText: وَعَادٌۭ وَفِرْعَوْنُ وَإِخْوَٰنُ لُوطٍۢ
translationText: And Aad, and Pharaoh, and the brethren of Lot.

arabicText: وَأَصْحَٰبُ ٱلْأَيْكَةِ وَقَوْمُ تُبَّعٍۢ ۚ كُلٌّۭ كَذَّبَ ٱلرُّسُلَ فَحَقَّ وَعِيدِ
translationText: And the Dwellers of the Woods, and the people of Tubba. They all rejected the messengers, so My threat came true.

arabicText: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى لَبْسٍۢ مِّنْ خَلْقٍۢ جَدِيدٍۢ
translationText: Were We fatigued by the first creation? But they are in doubt of a new creation.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ
translationText: We created the human being, and We know what his soul whispers to him. We are nearer to him than his jugular vein.

arabicText: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌۭ
translationText: As the two receivers receive, seated to the right and to the left.

arabicText: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌۭ
translationText: Not a word does he utter, but there is a watcher by him, ready.

arabicText: وَجَآءَتْ سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ
translationText: The daze of death has come in truth: "This is what you tried to evade."

arabicText: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْوَعِيدِ
translationText: And the Trumpet is blown: "This is the Promised Day."

arabicText: وَجَآءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۢ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌۭ وَشَهِيدٌۭ
translationText: And every soul will come forward, accompanied by a driver and a witness.

arabicText: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍۢ مِّنْ هَٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌۭ
translationText: "You were in neglect of this, so We lifted your screen from you, and your vision today is keen."

arabicText: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ
translationText: And His escort will say, "This is what I have ready with me."

arabicText: أَلْقِيَا فِى جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍۢ
translationText: "Throw into Hell every stubborn disbeliever.

arabicText: مَّنَّاعٍۢ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍۢ مُّرِيبٍ
translationText: Preventer of good, aggressor, doubter.

arabicText: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَأَلْقِيَاهُ فِى ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلشَّدِيدِ
translationText: Who fabricated another god with God; toss him into the intense agony."

arabicText: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطْغَيْتُهُۥ وَلَٰكِن كَانَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍۢ
translationText: His escort will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him rebel, but he was far astray."

arabicText: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا۟ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ
translationText: He will say, "Do not feud in My presence-I had warned you in advance.

arabicText: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّٰمٍۢ لِّلْعَبِيدِ
translationText: The decree from Me will not be changed, and I am not unjust to the servants."

arabicText: يَوْمَ نَقُولُ لِجَهَنَّمَ هَلِ ٱمْتَلَأْتِ وَتَقُولُ هَلْ مِن مَّزِيدٍۢ
translationText: On the Day when We will say to Hell, "Are you full?" And it will say, "Are there any more?"

arabicText: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ
translationText: And Paradise will be brought closer to the pious, not far away.

arabicText: هَٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍۢ
translationText: "This is what you were promised-for every careful penitent.

arabicText: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍۢ مُّنِيبٍ
translationText: Who inwardly feared the Most Gracious, and came with a repentant heart.

arabicText: ٱدْخُلُوهَا بِسَلَٰمٍۢ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُلُودِ
translationText: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity."

arabicText: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌۭ
translationText: Therein they will have whatever they desire-and We have even more.

arabicText: وَكَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّن قَرْنٍ هُمْ أَشَدُّ مِنْهُم بَطْشًۭا فَنَقَّبُوا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَٰدِ هَلْ مِن مَّحِيصٍ
translationText: How many generations before them, who were more powerful than they, did We destroy? They explored the lands-was there any escape?

arabicText: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌۭ
translationText: In that is a reminder for whoever possesses a heart, or cares to listen and witness.

arabicText: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍۢ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍۢ
translationText: We created the heavens and the earth and what is between them in six days, and no fatigue touched Us.

arabicText: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ
translationText: So endure what they say, and proclaim the praises of your Lord before the rising of the sun, and before sunset.

arabicText: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ
translationText: And glorify Him during the night, and at the end of devotions.

arabicText: وَٱسْتَمِعْ يَوْمَ يُنَادِ ٱلْمُنَادِ مِن مَّكَانٍۢ قَرِيبٍۢ
translationText: And listen for the Day when the caller calls from a nearby place.

arabicText: يَوْمَ يَسْمَعُونَ ٱلصَّيْحَةَ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ يَوْمُ ٱلْخُرُوجِ
translationText: The Day when they will hear the Shout in all truth. That is the Day of Emergence.

arabicText: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ
translationText: It is We who control life and death, and to Us is the destination.

arabicText: يَوْمَ تَشَقَّقُ ٱلْأَرْضُ عَنْهُمْ سِرَاعًۭا ۚ ذَٰلِكَ حَشْرٌ عَلَيْنَا يَسِيرٌۭ
translationText: The Day when the earth will crack for them at once. That is an easy gathering for Us.

arabicText: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍۢ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ
translationText: We are fully aware of what they say, and you are not a dictator over them. So remind by the Quran whoever fears My warning.
